title: The Unexpected Delay
content: Daniel’s train stopped unexpectedly in the countryside due to a technical problem. At first, passengers received little information about the situation. Some became frustrated, while others remained patient and continued reading or chatting. Eventually, staff explained that repairs were underway and the train would continue shortly. Although the delay lasted nearly two hours, Daniel used the time to talk with another traveler and learn about local destinations. What initially seemed like an inconvenience became an interesting conversation and a reminder that flexibility is an important part of travel.
